extractions.universe_condition: Shown only if Q1 ('Our records have your name as ${e://Field/FirstNameFill} ${e://Field/LastNameFill}. Is this correct?') = 2 ('Yes, but name has legally changed or is misspelled').
validation_rules: Two text inputs: First Name and Last Name.
Both fields required before proceeding (implied by correction capture).
extractions.reasoning: NAME_CORR is clearly a follow-up to Q1 response option 2 (name change/misspelling) and naturally proceeds to confirm the address next.

extractions.universe_condition: Shown if Q1 = 1 (Yes) OR Q1 = 2 (Yes, but name has legally changed or is misspelled). Not shown if Q1 = 3 (No).
skip_patterns: If Q1 = 3 (No), skip ADDRESS_CONFIRM and go to GET_NAME.
If ADDRESS_CONFIRM = 1 (Yes), skip GET_NAME, END, and R2a; continue to LANG.
If ADDRESS_CONFIRM = 2 (No), terminate via R2a ('You are not eligible to complete this survey.').
validation_rules: Must select one option to proceed.
extractions.reasoning: As an eligibility/verification step for the sampled address, a 'No' response conventionally screens out (R2a). A 'Yes' proceeds to the next substantive section (LANG).

extractions.complete_question_text: Our records have ${e://Field/FirstNameFill} ${e://Field/LastNameFill} as the primary respondent for your household. Please either ask ${e://Field/FirstNameFill} ${e://Field/LastNameFill} to complete the survey now, or share the link you used to access the survey with them.
extractions.universe_condition: Shown only if Q1 = 3 (No), i.e., the person at the keyboard is not the named primary respondent.
skip_patterns: Skipped if Q1 = 1 (Yes) or Q1 = 2 (name corrected).
If GET_NAME = 1 (Continue survey now), skip END and proceed to LANG.
If GET_NAME = 2 (End survey), show END ('Please close your browser window now...') and terminate.
validation_rules: Must select one option to proceed.
extractions.reasoning: GET_NAME is the corrective gate when the person is not the primary respondent. 'Continue now' implies the primary respondent is now present; thus route to the main survey. 'End survey' shows the end instruction screen.
